ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Continued To Sep-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Interested Parties For Order Directing The Executor To Transfer Real Property [Probate Code, Section 850 Et.Seq.]
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Prag for Colleen Cook. Judith Clark for (Interested Parties) James P. Murphy, Sr., James P. Murphy, Jr. and Michael Murphy.

The Court stated that it has the recent filing and asked Ms. Clark if she has reviewed the August 18, 2016 filing. Ms. Clark stated that it was just received, that there is a dispute that the property should be treated differently by the 1031 exchange, that the decedent had been notified, that the judgment for Susan Murphy refers to this property, that the objection is not accurate, that the agreement was in reference to the Susan Murphy estate and that the property being exchanged does not obviate it. The Court asked if this is heading towards an evidentiary hearing or can it be submitted and the parties confirmed that they are not requesting an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Prag stated that when Susan Murphy passed the properties were not part of her estate, that there is no dispute regarding the order issued in Alameda County and that they did not raise issues in their response regarding the delay. Ms. Clark responded that in regards to the delay, it was set forth in the petition statement of Colleen that she had no interest in those properties. Mr. Prag stated that there are 2 time periods here. The Court confirmed that given the late date of the filing there are responses that are going to be filed and stated that the Petition of Interested Parties for Order Directing the executor to Transfer Real Property will be under submission as of September 7, 2016 and that any additional filings are due no later than September 2, 2016.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
